_comment: Unambiguous Romanian diacritic restorations. Keys are lowercased ASCII-stripped forms whose ONLY Romanian interpretation is the diacriticked value. Matched on word boundaries; case is projected back from the input. NEVER add a key whose ASCII form is also a valid Romanian word — especially def-article fem-sg forms ending in -a (e.g. scoala/școala, viata/viața, casa/casă, biserica/biserică, tara/țară, varsta/vârsta) which are ALWAYS ambiguous against the indef diacriticked form. Expand conservatively. A wrong substitution corrupts UDPipe input.
